sharedEntities.description: Core entity representing a financial loan with attributes like ID, status, amount, and interest rate. Defined in Contracts, persisted in DbModel, and operated on via WebApi.
Banking account used for transfers and financial operations. Defined in DbModel and manipulated through WebApi endpoints.
Represents movement of funds between accounts with status tracking. Defined in DbModel and initiated via WebApi endpoints.
Groups multiple loans for bulk processing. Defined as BatchInfo in Contracts, persisted in DbModel, and queried via WebApi.
Tracks interest accruals for loans over time. Defined in DbModel and processed via WebApi's interest accrual flows.

dataFlows.name: Loan Purchase Flow
dataFlows.description: End-to-end flow for MPLs to purchase loans from banks
steps: Data persisted to database via DbModel

dataFlows.name: Interest Accrual Flow
dataFlows.description: Daily process for calculating and applying interest to loans
steps: Interest calculated based on loan terms from DbModel

dataFlows.name: Fee Processing Flow
dataFlows.description: Process for collecting and managing fees associated with loans
steps: Fee calculations based on contracts and volume

dataFlows.name: Reporting Flow
dataFlows.description: Generation of pre-sale and post-sale loan reports
steps: Report generated and stored in AWS S3

integrationPoints.description: WebApi uses DbModel to persist and retrieve loan and account data
WebApi uses Contracts to define data structures for API request/response models
Bidirectional integration for loan data exchange with the bank's core system
Retrieves contract information to validate loan operations
Bidirectional integration for financial accounting operations related to loans
Uses SQS for reliable background processing of loan operations
Persists all loan, account, and transaction data to PostgreSQL database

patterns.description: Used for reliable asynchronous processing across multiple services
Abstracts data access logic from business logic
Common entity definitions shared across services

ambiguities: In COS.Lending.Selling.WebApi, the business rules for loan transfer eligibility based on account types need more explicit definition
In Cos.Lending.Selling.Contracts, the specific mappings and display logic for LoanInfo's field1-field21 properties are not clearly defined
In Cos.Lending.Selling.DbModel, the specific constraints and validation rules for the one-to-many relationship between LoanAccount and Account are not explicitly defined
The exact algorithm for interest calculation referenced in DailyInterestOutbox is not explicitly defined in any repository
